props.title: The First Feature MiroShark Knew Who It Was For

props.text: The First Feature MiroShark Knew Who It Was For

For 56 days and 26 feature PRs, MiroShark shipped surfaces aimed at "whoever shows up." PR #83 (Discord + Slack rich notifications, opened today) is the first feature whose PR body cites a named external integrator's stack — @revaultdrops Discord — by name.
Architecturally, it's the third instance of the channel-notifier idiom; the fourth channel becomes a copy.
